Name: Quantum-Si incorporated
Description: Quantum-Si Incorporated is a cutting-edge life sciences technology company specializing in the advancement of protein sequencing through its proprietary single-molecule technology and unique quantum dot capabilities. By providing high-throughput and cost-effective sequencing solutions, the company aims to revolutionize protein analysis, facilitating significant advancements in genomics and personalized medicine. Backed by a robust intellectual property portfolio, Quantum-Si is strategically positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for innovative sequencing technologies in both academic and clinical environments, driving forward life sciences research and applications.
Address: 29 BUSINESS PARK DRIVE, BRANFORD, CT, UNITED STATES, 06405
